channel.title: Authors on Vineet Tambe
channel.description: Recent content in Authors on Vineet Tambe

item.title: Vineet Tambe
item.description: Hey there! I’m an ECE by major and a Roboticist at heart. Come join me in my journey to wire the unwired :P. Currently I am working on: deploying private 5G core on the cloud figuring out ways to count the number of tigers in the Sahyadri Forest using multi-drone systems - contrubution https://github.
